name: validate-vs-test-distinguished
assertion: The skill clearly distinguishes npm run validate (package's own fixtures/bundle) from test/ssss-conformance.test.mjs (this repo's vault)

name: coverage-gaps-script-accurate
assertion: coverage-gaps.mjs's reported gap list is derived by parsing real imports, not a hardcoded list, and matches an independent audit

name: no-ci-claim-accurate
assertion: The skill correctly states there is no .github/workflows/ — verify this hasn't changed before trusting the claim
